input.question: Compare the number of distinct courses taught by each professor

payload.question: Compare the number of distinct courses taught by each professor

output.sql:
SELECT p.professor_id AS professor_id,
       p.name AS professor_name,
       COUNT(DISTINCT t.course_id) AS distinct_courses_count
FROM professors AS p
LEFT JOIN teaches AS t ON p.professor_id = t.professor_id
GROUP BY p.professor_id, p.name
ORDER BY distinct_courses_count DESC
LIMIT 1000;

visualization.description: Bar chart comparing the number of distinct courses taught by each professor.
visualization.title: Distinct courses taught per professor

payload.sql:
SELECT p.professor_id AS professor_id,
       p.name AS professor_name,
       COUNT(DISTINCT t.course_id) AS distinct_courses_count
FROM professors AS p
LEFT JOIN teaches AS t ON p.professor_id = t.professor_id
GROUP BY p.professor_id, p.name
ORDER BY distinct_courses_count DESC
LIMIT 1000;
